description: writing-room/docs/voice.md is used by community/CONTEXT.md as a cross-workspace dependency. writing-room has no documentation of this dependency, making voice.md appear to be an internal-only document when it is actually a shared resource.
evidence: community/CONTEXT.md loads ../writing-room/docs/voice.md for newsletters. writing-room/CONTEXT.md and voice.md contain no indication they are consumed externally.
proposed_expansion: Add to writing-room/CONTEXT.md What NOT to Do section: 'Do not treat voice.md as internal-only. community/ pulls it cross-workspace. Changes to voice.md affect community output.'
